race.comment: ENCHANTED MISS (5) won well two back before a disappointing effort last start at Northam when getting well back from the wide draw. Now out to 1800m for the first time with the blinkers going on. Tsang's claim is a big tick and she can return to winning ways. GEE TEE (9) was solid on resumption before missing last start at Belmont when out to 1400m. She jumps in trip now third-up into the campaign and some firmer footing this time around should suit her much better. Likely to get back in the run but watch for her flying late in the race. GLOBAL TRIP (6) led them up last start at Northam and couldn't hold on when beaten 1L. Ramoly hops back aboard now and he rates highly on the back of his last effort. Will give them something to run down. HANSELLE (2) got the job done last start at Belmont and looks a nice type on the rise. Can go on with the job. SISTER MARY (7) comes back in trip now off the Belmont Oaks and makes plenty of appeal.
